untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) statistical test with p-value threshold (0.10) and confirmation over N bars (3). ADF test is not available in the allowed indicators list. Bollinger Bands (bb_lower, bb_middle, bb_upper, bb_pct_b) used as practical proxy for mean-reversion detection, but this does not mathematically replicate the ADF stationarity test specified in the original rule.
translation_notes: Mapped 'Price < Mean - 1.5*StdDev' to close crossing below Bollinger Band lower (which is mean - 2*stddev by default). Used bb_pct_b < 0.25 as additional confirmation of extreme deviation. Exit conditions use Bollinger Band middle as the mean-reversion target. Hard stop approximated via stop_loss_pct set to 2.5 (matching 2.5 stddev threshold). Cannot fully replicate ADF statistical test; consider this a structural approximation only.
